videos.title: I took a vintage train to Pemberley
videos.description:
This is truly one of the most incredible days I have lived... I loved every moment.

If you're wondering, I booked through Luxury Train Tickets who organised for me to travel alone (groups of 1 and 3 can be difficult on this train, so I would recommend going through them if you're a solo traveller!): https://www.luxurytraintickets.com/?srsltid=AfmBOoo8wKmxIBYJ_awOqrhLTP8LzSP1SPj5BHa3dij4Qj089fd3nNTs (not an ad, by the way!).

videos.title: What I Pack for a Solo Trip (in England)
Live Read With Me (National Reading Hour)
videos.description: It is National Reading Hour on Thursday 23rd April! From 7pm-8pm, the National Literary Foundation is encouraging everyone in the UK to read something (a book, a comic, an essay, a blogpost, a magazine... it really can be anything!). Please do join me on Thursday if you want the company! :)
